## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link issues: Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check` and `uv run ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes for changed Python libraries
- [ ] Docs/comments updated (and `docs/` if behavior or spec changed)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or model weights committed
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
- [ ] Respects the [product principles](../docs/product-principles.md)
